center.name: 堪薩斯州
center.summary: 堪薩斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Scaled quail、Green ibis、橫斑林鴞等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green ibis is found from Costa Rica south to northern Argentina and Paraguay. However, there have been sightings from as far north as Honduras, and fossil records show the species formerly occurred as far north as Kansas in the United States. It is found in a variety of forested wetland habitats, particularly swamps and along the edges of rivers and lakes, at altitudes up to

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | pages =614–615 }} There are records of vagrants along the west coast from British Columbia south and further east of its core range in Montana, Wyoming, Colorado, Kansas, Oklahoma, and Nebraska

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: *Callipepla squamata hargravei Rea, 1973 (Upper Sonoran scaled quail). A form of arid habitat, it is only found in the area where the states of Colorado, Kansas and Oklahoma meet, and in northwestern New Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Ontario Birds, 11, 18–22. The barred owl has been recorded as far north as central Labrador, though the species is not yet confirmed to breed in the province. The barred owl ranges in every part of the eastern United States continuously from northernmost Maine down throughout New England, the Mid-Atlantic states, much of the Midwest, the Southeast United States and all of Florida. Their range extends without substantial gaps to the limits of western Minnesota, easternmost South Dakota, the southeastern corner of Nebraska, the eastern half roughly of Kansas, most of Oklahoma and east Texas to as far west as Cisco and Burnet.Janssen, R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Historic ranges in the United States covered the majority of the Southern states and much of the Midwest (in Kentucky, Indiana, Ohio, Illinois, Missouri, Iowa, Kansas, Nebraska, and as far north as Wisconsin and Minnesota). Aside from the US, it resides in many areas throughout Central and South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Chihuahuan raven occurs in the Southwestern and Midwestern United States and northern Mexico, including southeastern Arizona, southern New Mexico, southeastern Colorado, western Kansas, western Oklahoma, and southern and western Texas
